title: MolmoAct2: Action Reasoning Models for Real-world Deployment
summary: MolmoAct2 is a fully open action reasoning model built for real-world robot deployment. It introduces MolmoER, a vision-language backbone specialised for spatial and embodied reasoning, and grafts a flow-matching continuous-action expert onto a discrete-token VLM via per-layer KV-cache conditioning. Additional contributions include OpenFAST, an open-weight action tokenizer trained across five embodiments, and MolmoThink, an adaptive-depth reasoning variant. Across simulation and real-world benchmarks it outperforms baselines including π0.5, while MolmoER surpasses strong embodied-reasoning models across a suite of benchmarks.
